source_path: 7. Contact360 deployment/7.3.99 — Local deployment blocker evidence.json
summary: Local deployment and boot blockers found while running service-by-service smoke checks.
flowcharts:
flowchart LR
  contract[Contract]
  service[Service]
  surface[Surface]
  data[Data]
  ops[Ops]
  gate[Release gate]

  contract --> gate
  service --> gate
  surface --> gate
  data --> gate
  ops --> gate

contract.text: Define canonical local env bootstrap contract per service (`required env`, default ports, dependency matrix).

service.text: Fix `sync` ticker interval guard to reject zero values gracefully instead of panic.

surface.text: Publish deployment-status visibility in admin/operator surface for failed local boots (service name, reason, fix hint).

data.text: Align local DB credentials for sync/job stacks with active dockerized Postgres profile.

ops.text: Add one-command local bootstrap that starts dependencies (Postgres/OpenSearch/S3-compatible mock) before app start.
Add CI smoke checks for "process binds expected port" per service.

sections.heading: Focus
sections.prose: Local deployment and boot blockers found while running service-by-service smoke checks.
